_comment: profiles/day-trading ships the tilt-guard PreToolUse hook ENABLED. The matcher covers this repo's MCP server (mcp__financial-planner__place_order), other common MCP broker tools (binance, ccxt), and the Web webhook receiver path used by Bash invocations. Extend the matcher when you add more order-placement tools. See ../../.claude/skills/tilt-guard/check.py for the gate logic. Hook exits 2 (block) on missing/stale state.yaml or status=BLOCKED — fail-closed per SECURITY.md.
